summary: Comprehensive frontend testing completed for Hotel Boutique reservation system. Successfully tested login page, user authentication, role-based access control, room management, reservation functionality, and mobile responsiveness.

ui_bugs.issue: Mobile select dropdown options not clickable in filters

session_management.issue: Authentication session expires when navigating directly to protected routes, causing redirect to login

passed_tests: Login page renders correctly with both login and register forms
Login form toggle between login/register modes works
Admin login (admin@hotelimperium.com / Admin123!) redirects to dashboard
Staff dashboard shows stats (ocupación, disponibles, check-ins, check-outs, ingresos)
Habitaciones page lists all rooms with filters (piso, tipo, estado)
Consultar Disponibilidad modal opens and accepts date/guest inputs
Reservas page shows reservation list
New Reservation modal works with step-by-step process
Room search and selection in reservation modal works
Guest information form in reservation modal works
Role-based navigation works (guest cannot access admin/staff pages)
Guest login works and shows appropriate dashboard
Guest role restrictions work correctly (redirected from check-in/check-out)
Recepcionista login works
Recepcionista can access check-in and check-out pages
Recepcionista correctly denied access to admin-only pages (Reportes, Usuarios)
Sidebar navigation works correctly
Mobile responsive design works
Mobile menu hamburger button works
Mobile navigation works
Logout functionality works for all user types
action_item_for_main_agent: 1. Fix mobile select dropdown interactions in filter components. 2. Review session management for direct navigation to protected routes - consider implementing session refresh or better token handling.
success_percentage: frontend: 90% - All core functionality working, minor issues with mobile dropdowns and session management
